return(function(...)local u={"\048\113\047\112\104\107\098\112\090\069\054\117\119\099\116\061","\101\111\098\074\117\057\061\061","\105\115\083\055\050\115\086\072\054\048\117\114\067\081\110\085\053\066\055\087\071\097\121\097\069\087\116\051\083\081\085\121\052\116\087\054\069\097\098\107\072\100\050\088\073\122\043\073\109\099\053\106\088\111\101\054\077\066\110\080\068\114\088\047\055\100\102\089\066\079\086\075\099\072\054\098\104\079\052\097\070\085\116\047\049\103\107\112\049\088\077\106\085\065\053\081\099\099\083\118\043\076\055\061";"\090\106\075\121\081\074\117\072\090\111\108\102\090\072\109\074\087\067\061\061";"\113\074\090\061","\117\086\070\047\081\074\098\083\087\113\101\114\115\086\100\100","\051\075\079\052\066\086\106\087\072\102\121\061";"\081\086\084\061";"\117\072\100\117\086\109\072\089\065\080\122\057\088\121\082\105\087\119\067\061";"\089\103\085\073\089\057\061\061";"\113\072\056\111\101\116\061\061";"\121\072\100\100\080\111\075\119\081\121\090\074\090\119\098\072","\083\081\048\089\067\077\047\080\097\057\061\061","\107\055\108\083\079\066\061\061";"\079\104\067\073\065\073\122\074\107\083\109\072\081\074\121\074\101\066\061\061","\102\101\115\108\066\115\084\061","\080\098\080\104\087\109\069\078\087\050\055\074\075\109\117\086","\080\086\117\072\101\074\112\087\057\074\117\051\090\074\112\111\101\116\061\061","\115\086\112\081\087\086\088\078\107\121\069\121\101\080\108\116","\074\052\080\078\057\048\089\056\082\085\122\048\088\113\084\061","\053\111\098\120\065\113\100\085\087\073\101\047\115\083\065\053","\099\115\079\121\111\051\065\070\116\116\121\068\050\113\085\078","\107\114\100\108\117\050\098\110\101\086\069\104\090\111\100\043\090\066\061\061","\048\089\080\109\101\073\122\111\057\111\098\115\075\080\104\108","\065\086\085\115\090\098\104\071\075\111\098\049\088\086\069\110\053\057\061\061","\082\084\101\072\118\051\109\069";"\110\057\061\061","\065\080\097\055\053\089\088\080\057\121\108\087\115\049\075\097\088\067\061\061";"\115\053\065\049\057\073 g,O in ipairs({{359252-(399257-40006),332791-332613},{(129836+-993912)+864077,-400526-(-400543)},{-351483+351501,223006-(241375+-18547)}})do while O[-945773+945774]<O[(414505-(-250309))-664812]do e=string.char local A=math.floor for u=-536887+536888,#v,(302767-(-729400))+-1032166 do local r=v[u]if f(r)=="\115\116\114\105\110\103"then local f=O(r)local l={}local return(function(u,q,f,H,v,V,e,G,d,c,x,L,A,W,O,C,l,n,p,r,K,w,F)G,O,W,K,d,F,A,w,L,C,p,n,x,r,c,l=function(u,g)local q=K(g)local f=function(...)return O(u,{...},g,q)end return f end,function(O,f,H,v)local jw,W,Gw,Ow,b,dw,Fw,cw,o,I,Kw,Aw,a,Cw,zw,nw,Tw,gw,Pw,Jw,r,lw,P,X,L,Iw,ew,ww,R,Qw,vw,i,t,N,y,rw,Lw,aw,Vw,xw,bw,Sw,h,Y,T,D,tw,uw,B,Ww,Uw,K,Hw,U,m,k,Q,fw,j,pw,E,iw,yw,qw,Zw,Z,S,z,s,e,M,J while O do if O<-996333+9265755 then if O<3747999-(-78681)then if O<534936+1109882 then if O<128141-((-847370+-560072)-(-898850))then if O<-346772+710412 then if O<-286142-(-476431)then if O<-154876-(-523205+260209)then if O<(271982-554257)-(-345518)then i=-44498+44498 e=#T O=e==i O=(-445521+1291666)+3017613 else O=u[g(491626-503919)]e={}end else if O<-15740+174463 then rw=A[ew]O=(6962358-(-744334))-(172590-(-102932))Aw=rw else L,I=K(r,L)O=L and-684297+17112268 or 10201600-996449 end end else if O<-649556-(-970089)then if O<705280-(184846-(-312164))then Kw=ww O=Cw O=591168+4243818 else O=A[j]fw=O()O=-538365+4368416 end else O=5568214-705721 end end else if O<(53476+938505)+-485322 then if O<-568994+(1268973-285858)then if O<-540029+932623 then Ww=g(-547012-(-534693))Kw=u[Ww]lw=rw Gw=g((-981690+1726663)-757393)Cw=u[Gw]ww=Cw[Lw]Ww=Kw(ww)ww=g(-248171-(-314091-(-78239)))Kw=u[ww]Gw=A[uw]Cw=Gw[Lw]ww=Kw(Cw)O=Ww~=ww O=O and 1016467+542271 or 67444+3325867 else O=Ow and 6762486-(-336211)or 16887751-642625 end else W=24520748774514-54915
